name: Belgian Resources and Capital Company
summary: Belgian Resources and Capital Company primarily invests in listed and unquoted securities in Belgium. The company was formerly known as The Belgian Real Estate Company of Canada Ltd. and changed its name to Belgian Resources and Capital Company in November 2000. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Antwerp, Belgium. Belgian Resources and Capital Company is a subsidiary of Compagnie Commerciale Belge NV.
